## Summary

Describe the smart-grid or storage playbook change.

## Reader Value

- [ ] Clarifies a concept.
- [ ] Adds a glossary term.
- [ ] Adds a diagram.
- [ ] Improves project review questions.

## Validation

- [ ] Acronyms are defined.
- [ ] Technical claims are scoped.
- [ ] Sources or evidence prompts are included where needed.
